input.user_input: Revise the payment schedule in Exhibit B so that milestone payments align with the updated project timeline I described in our last conversation.

actual:
I do not have access to our previous conversations or the document containing Exhibit B. 

Could you please upload the document and remind me of the details of the updated project timeline? Once you share those, I would be happy to help you revise the payment schedule.
